texto: The flowering chocolate drink is foaming,Tobacco flowers are passed round,If my heart tastes them,I will be intoxicated…Listen, I am alone and tormented,May I not go to the place of the fleshless…Alone I must go, my own self shall become lost…I will go alone,My heart covered with flowers…Thus let it be,But let it be without violence!
explicacao: Orientação direta de Tlaltecatzin sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “The flowering chocolate drink is foaming,Tobacco flowers are passed round,If my heart tastes them…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, death, paz, útil em momentos de luto e paz.
